manifest.name: OPSE Oracle

name: OPSE Oracle

releases.author: Snifer
releases.description:
## Release OPSE Obsidian Oracle TTRPG [1.0.0] — 2026-04-18

### Added

- Full OPSE v1.6 rules engine with all tables (Actions, Details, Themes, Domains, Complications, Altered Scenes, GM Moves, NPC Identity, NPC Objective, Dungeon tables, Hex tables)
- Yes/No Oracle with probability levels (Probable 3+, Even 4+, Improbable 5+) and `but…` / `and…` modifiers
- How Much Oracle (6-entry magnitude scale per OPSE v1.6)
- Focus Oracles: Action, Detail, Theme, Double Focus
- GM Moves: Beat Moves and Failure Moves
- Random Event generator (Action Focus + Theme Focus)
- Plot Hook generator (Goal + Adversaries + Reward, 3×d6)
- NPC Generator using OPSE v1.6 Identity and Objective tables
- Generic Content generator
- Scene Engine with complication roll and altered scene check
- Dungeon Tracker with persistent room graph, exits (d6 ranges per OPSE), and backtracking
- Hex Exploration with axial coordinates, compass navigation, terrain distribution per OPSE v1.6
- Persistent history with pin, copy, insert, re-roll, interpretation field, and type filters
- Deck modes: Dice (d12+d4), Cards (54-card with Jokers), Persistent Deck (saved across reloads)
- Joker detection triggers automatic Random Event and reshuffles deck
- Adventure state with scene rank, thread manager, dungeon link, region link
- Session export to Markdown
- Right-sidebar Control Panel with collapsible sections
- Exploration View with Dungeon / Hex tabs
- Full i18n: English and Spanish
- ESLint configuration with `@typescript-eslint` ruleset
- All command names resolved through i18n (language-aware in command palette)

### Fixed

- Dungeon and hex states now correctly persisted to plugin settings and linked to the active adventure
- Deck state persists across Obsidian reloads in Persistent Deck mode
- Deck correctly uses Jokers when in Cards or Persistent Deck mode
- All OPSE v1.6 tables corrected to match the reference PDF (previously diverged significantly)
- Domain suit mapping corrected: ♣=Physical, ♦=Technical, ♠=Mystic, ♥=Social
- Settings panel i18n: removed hardcoded Spanish text
- History max entries slider now correctly reads and saves `historyMaxEntries`
- Reroll button in history now handles all entry types including scene, dungeon, and hex
- Hex terrain generation uses d6 ranges per OPSE v1.6 (was incorrectly using d12)
- Dungeon exit count uses d6 ranges per OPSE v1.6 (1-2: dead end, 3-4: 1 exit, 5-6: 2 exits)
